Notice And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Atty Fees
Off Calendar Jun-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. Motion for Judgment On The Pleadings and Attorney Fees. Appearances: Defendant May Louie Defendant, in Pro Per, and opposing party, appearing. There are no other appearances. Defendant failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted, without leave to amend. No opposition filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
